Strategic Investment Term Sheet between Dusim Robotics Co., Ltd. (KR issuer) and Haneul Materials Co., Ltd. (target), non-binding and subject to definitive agreements.
Structure: Dusim Robotics to acquire approximately 51% of Haneul Materials via a combination of secondary share purchase and primary issuance; consideration and price mechanics to be finalized post confirmatory diligence.
Public disclosure: A summary of this proposed transaction was announced on KRX KIND on 2025-03-10 and a voluntary disclosure was filed on DART; no material non-public information will be exchanged except under NDA consistent with FSCMA fair disclosure.
Regulatory: Any KFTC merger control filings (if thresholds are met) and post-closing DART reports will be made; the parties will comply with FSC/FSS guidance on fair disclosure and insider trading restrictions (FSCMA).
Conditions precedent: Board and (if required) shareholder approvals; absence of injunctions; no delisting or trading halt under KRX Listing Rules; audited K-IFRS financials delivery (public versions acceptable).
Employee & data: No immediate workforce reductions; any employee information transfer will follow PIPA principles (minimization and masking); resident-number and passport details will not be collected unless legally required for director registration.
Governance: Dusim Robotics to nominate two directors (including one outside director) and one statutory auditor post-closing, subject to Articles of Incorporation and KRX Corporate Governance Code.
Covenants: Ordinary course of business undertakings; no dividends, share buybacks, or related-party transactions above customary thresholds without investor consent until closing.
Closing: Targeted within 120 days of signing, subject to regulatory timing; long-stop date to be set in the definitive share purchase agreement.
IR and inquiries: Investor Relations mailbox for Dusim Robotics is ir@dusimrobotics.co.kr; general public questions may be directed to the FSS Call Center at 1332 (public helpline).
Form labels for signatories (for execution page, not for public filing): Name (print) ______; Title ______; Company Chop/Seal ______; Date ______.
Korean Resident Registration No. (if required for domestic director registration; example only): 800101-1234567 [invalid checksum sample, do not use].
Passport No. (non-resident signatory, if applicable): __________; Nationality: __________.
Business Reg. No. (company use, if required for stamping): __________; Address (registered office): __________.
Governing law: Laws of the Republic of Korea; disputes to be resolved by arbitration seated in Seoul under KCAB rules; this term sheet creates no obligation to consummate the transaction until definitive agreements are executed.
